name: space-monopoly
description: Monopoli Antariksa - 3D Space-Themed Monopoly (React Three Fiber + Socket.io)

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.render-build: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client && npm run build --prefix client
